name: team_success_rate multi-year LIST wrap pools across years (executed-result parity)
description: Seed team ZZ plays across 2023 (2 of 3 successful) and 2024 (1 of 1), with the test player on ZZ both years. The non-offset multi-year LIST on a player subject enters wrap mode; the wrap CTE now projects the bare pooled rate sum(num)/NULLIF(sum(den),0) = 3/4 = 0.75, proving the column_value main-select resolves and pools across the year LIST (no offset range, no split).
expected_query: with "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator, COUNT(*) as team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(nfl_team ORDER BY game_count DESC, nfl_team ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023, 2024) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2023, 2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_year_teams"."pid", sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) as team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator, sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator) as team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator, sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator), 0) as team_success_rate_from_plays from "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" inner join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."team" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."nfl_team" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."year" group by "player_year_teams"."pid"), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023,2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_success_rate_from_plays" AS "team_success_rate_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2024 inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" on "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_success_rate_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS team_success_rate_from_plays_0 FROM nfl_plays WHERE off='ZZ' AND year IN (2023,2024) AND seas_type='REG' AND play_type <> 'NOPL'
